name: KumbhSync
description: A real-time volunteer orchestration platform built for Mahakumbh. It reduces emergency dispatch overhead by 40% using an automated matching algorithm, and streams live incident metrics with sub-100ms latency.

name: Project Management API
description: A production-grade RESTful API designed with MVC architecture to manage projects, task assignments, and notes. It features robust role-based access control (Admin/Member) and is secured with JWT authentication, refresh token rotation, and email verification. Data retrieval is highly optimized using MongoDB aggregation pipelines to reduce complex multi-collection query overhead.
